name: shit-bot
description: Monitor X/Twitter users and forward posts to Discord/Telegram

scripts.build:binary: bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/shit-bot && cp src/web/ui.html dist/ui.html
scripts.build:binary:docker: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/app -w /app oven/bun sh -c 'bun install && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/shit-bot && cp src/web/ui.html dist/ui.html'
